title: Superior Scrolls
description: A resource pack that changes books with scrolls
body:
### Inferior books, Superior Scrolls. ![Golden Line](https://i.imgur.com/E6fBew0.png) ![Title](https://i.imgur.com/DrgGva4.png) ![Golden Line](https://i.imgur.com/E6fBew0.png) ![About](https://i.imgur.com/SPHSbxf.png) Have you ever felt like books were a little too... irrelevant to the vibe you were going for? I've got you covered. This resource pack replaces all the books with scrolls. This includes regular books, enchanted books, recipe books, book and quill, signed books and even lectern and enchanting table books! Not only the textures, but the names too. ![Item Name Changes](https://i.imgur.com/oxtlzSE.png) ![Golden Line but Thin](https://i.imgur.com/H0OcSes.png) ![Features](https://i.imgur.com/83JDWWE.png)
Spoiler ![CIT](https://i.imgur.com/f5FuwKk.png) That's right, this pack also has CIT! It's purely a decorative feature. Rename a regular scroll with an anvil to get 3D scrolls which you can put on item frames to decorate your builds. All names must be written in all caps. NOTICE: This feature requires [CIT RESEWN (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [CIT Reforged (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/citreforged) to work on versions older than 1.21.5. On versions 1.21.5+, this feature is available in vanilla and doesn't require any mods to work. Just make sure you download the correct version of the resource pack. ![line](https://i.imgur.com/eXJ6HVY.png) ## CIT NAME LIST - ANCIENT SCROLL - BLACK SCROLL - BLUE SCROLL - BROWN SCROLL - CYAN SCROLL - DARKSTALKER'S SCROLL _(Wings of Fire, anyone?)_ - ENCHANTED SCROLL - SCROLL _(Regular scroll)_ - GRAY SCROLL - GREEN SCROLL - LIGHT BLUE SCROLL - LIGHT GRAY SCROLL - LIGHT GREEN SCROLL - LIME SCROLL - MAGENTA SCROLL - ORANGE SCROLL - PINK SCROLL - PURPLE SCROLL - RED SCROLL - TATTERED SCROLL - WHITE SCROLL - YELLOW SCROLL ![line](https://i.imgur.com/eXJ6HVY.png) - SCROLL PILE - ENCHANTED SCROLL PILE - RANDOM SCROLL PILE ![line](https://i.imgur.com/eXJ6HVY.png) - PARCHMENT AND QUILL _(You need to rename a Parchment and Quill for this one)_ ![Golden Line but Thin](https://i.imgur.com/H0OcSes.png) ![Mod Compatibility](https://i.imgur.com/13t8O4o.png)
![Golden Line but Thin](https://i.imgur.com/H0OcSes.png) ![Requirements](https://i.imgur.com/GFNaxX1.png) ![Golden Line but Thin](https://i.imgur.com/H0OcSes.png) Image Credits: Photon and Rethinking Voxels shaders were used.
